# .github

## Purpose
GitHub configuration including Actions workflows.

## Subdirectories

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `workflows/` | GitHub Actions CI/CD workflows |

## For AI Agents

### Working In This Directory
- Workflows trigger on push/PR/events
- Use secrets for sensitive data
- Test workflows on feature branches
